boxes.name: Cozy Cardboard Box
boxes.description: The first box given to you for free. Wrapped in packing tape and minor expectations.

boxes.name: Teddy Bear Bronze Crate
boxes.description: A chocolate-bronze crate adorned with fluffy teddy bear ears. Adorable, but guaranteed to contain useless items.

boxes.name: Cyber Kitty Neon Vault
boxes.description: A gaming console box styled like a cute kitty, complete with pink LED whiskers. 400% more energy-consuming.

boxes.name: Crowned Piggy Gold Safe
boxes.description: A golden safe styled like a crowned royal piggy bank. Smells of corporate bonuses and player tears.

boxes.name: Dopamine Diamond Box
boxes.description: A glittering pastel crystal crate designed to refract light into standard dopamine-inducing patterns.

boxes.name: Pinata Party Chest
boxes.description: Overflowing with paper fringe and absolute emptiness.

boxes.name: FOMO Fortified Safe
boxes.description: Equipped with real-time countdown timers that do absolutely nothing. Panic-buying not included.

boxes.name: Crypto Moon Rocket
boxes.description: A rocket-shaped container propelled by hype and burning graphics cards. Smells like virtual regret.

boxes.name: Corporate Pizza Party Box
boxes.description: A greasy cardboard pizza box awarded in lieu of a raise. Guaranteed to contain cold disappointment.

boxes.name: Gacha Waifu Capsule
boxes.description: A giant pastel-colored capsule with cat ears and blushing cheeks. 99.9% chance of duplicates.

boxes.name: Unicorn Sparkle Closet
boxes.description: A magical wardrobe decorated with pink glitter and sticker stars. Where your life savings go to hide fabulously!
